description: A card built from a screenshot of a Breitbart News article. The top has a large bold black all-caps headline 'JD VANCE: NATIVE-BORN CITIZENS ARE DRIVING GROWTH, JOBS ARE GOING TO AMERICAN WORKERS FOR A CHANGE'. Beneath the headline is a row of social-share buttons: a blue Facebook button showing '64', a black 'X / TWEET' button, a gray 'EMAIL' button, and a blue 'TRUTH' button. Below that, framed by a thick orange border, is a video still: JD Vance, in a dark suit, white shirt and red tie, with a beard, seated and speaking, an American flag to his left and faded 'BREITBART' text behind him; a white play-button triangle is over the center and a white Breitbart 'B' logo is in the upper right. Across the bottom of the still in large bold white block letters with a drop shadow is the phrase 'AMERICAN JOBS!'.
notable_text: JD VANCE: NATIVE-BORN CITIZENS ARE DRIVING GROWTH — 'JOBS ARE GOING TO AMERICAN WORKERS FOR A CHANGE'; AMERICAN JOBS!
